channel.title: Driftwood Brewing Company, Releases and Taproom News
channel.description: Release announcements, cellar pours, taproom events, and brewery news from a small farmhouse and lager brewery on East Burnside in Portland, Oregon.

item.title: Anniversary Wild Ale, foeder release Saturday October 31
item.author: stuart.myer@voissync.ai (Stuart Myer)
item.description: Twenty months in the foeder for our anniversary wild ale. Bottle pre-sale opens Wednesday, single night draft pour Halloween in the taproom.
item.content:encoded:
Our anniversary wild ale comes out of the foeder on Saturday, October 31. Twenty months of aging on the house mixed culture; soft acid, light funk, lemon zest, and a long finish. 250 bottles in 500 ml format, plus draft for one night only.

  • ABV 6.56%
  • Bottle pre-sale opens Wednesday October 28 at noon
  • One bottle per guest in the taproom, two bottles for mailing list members
  • Draft pour starts at 4 PM, last pour at 10 PM or until kegs are empty

item.title: Oktoberfest release night, October 3
item.author: jake.callahan@gmail.com (Jake Callahan)
item.description: Our Oktoberfest amber lager hits the taps Saturday October 3, with a brat and pretzel pop-up from a friend of the brewery.

item.title: Pouring at the Pacific Craft Beer Festival, Waterfront Park
item.author: jake.callahan@gmail.com (Jake Callahan)
item.description: Find us at booth Row C 14 on Saturday October 17 at Tom McCall Waterfront Park, pouring Oktoberfest, the Holiday Saison preview, and Czech Pilsner.

item.title: Cellar Wednesday, the wild ale blending program
item.author: stuart.myer@voissync.ai (Stuart Myer)
item.description: Stuart walks taproom guests through how blending decisions are made for the foeder program; cellar pours every other Wednesday through December.

item.title: Holiday release, Winter Ale Base Brew, December 19
item.author: jake.callahan@gmail.com (Jake Callahan)
item.description: Our Winter Ale Base Brew is fermenting now and releases Saturday December 19 with a small bourbon barrel aged variant on the same night.

item.title: Munich Dunkel, a Q4 trial run on the taps
item.author: stuart.myer@voissync.ai (Stuart Myer)
item.description: A Munich malt forward trial batch; if guests vote with their glasses we will add it to the regular rotation in 2027.
